Vaal Detonate Dead.description: Targets a corpse, and deals spell damage to enemies around the corpse, as well as causing the corpse to explode, dealing fire damage. The explosion is not affected by modifiers to spell damage and cannot be reflected. This will continue to target other corpses in the area, with an increasing delay between each one, until it runs out of corpses or has destroyed 22 corpses.
explicitMods: Deals (23-1395) to (33-2092) Fire Damage
Explosion deals base Fire Damage equal to (6-7.9)% of the corpse's Maximum Life
Base radius is (2.4-2.8) metres

Vaal Lightning Strike.description: Infuses your melee weapon with electrical energies as you swing. In addition to converting some of your physical damage to lightning damage, the stored energy becomes an orb attached to the enemy you hit, or the ground if you don't hit an enemy. The orb will periodically fire projectiles at other nearby enemies for a duration, which will also damage the enemy the orb is attached to.

Base duration is 6 seconds
Fires (5-9) Projectiles
Modifiers to Skill Effect Duration also apply to this Skill's Soul Gain Prevention
Can't be Evaded

In addition to converting some of your physical damage to lightning damage, the stored energy is released from the weapon as projectiles as you strike, flying out to hit farther-away enemies. The projectiles cannot miss if the melee attack hit a target.

Vaal Molten Shell.description: Applies a buff that raises your armour, and takes some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. You cannot have the buff at the same time as any other Guard skill.
